assessment_items.question_content:
**How many wheels do you see?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/8850b5d6e98b0a93d94564f60e904ffb.jpeg)  
Andy Warhol, *Benz Racing Car,* n.d.

**How many buttons are on the front of the coat?**

[[☃ radio 1]]  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7a317d1ddb302facb95fb63e0bbe49c1.jpeg)  
Vincent Van Gogh, *Postman Joseph Roulin,* $1888$.
hints:
The coat has $\pink{8}$ buttons on the front.

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1a40c438bca7b3656dd86714d6870263.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/0ac9864e9d0fbc2e4d393397394e2635.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/22627860f556cb8007b3900d929091be.jpeg)

[[☃ radio 1]]  

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/35848ce84f5596cf49a44a9a0de8544a.jpeg)

Here is a flamingo:
![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/73534522c7946c718ec6740c3be1b18d.png)  


**How many flamingos do you see here?**

[[☃ radio 3]]

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/161ecb2c81a7cc454642951173128c5a.jpg)  
Henry Rousseau, *The Flamingos*, $1907$
hints:
There are $\pink{4}$ flamingos in the painting.
